name: Enchillada Suisa
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove papery husks from tomatillos.
2. Wash tomatillos and chiles well.
3. Cook, covered, in a little boiling water until tender (about 15 minutes).
4. Remove stems and seeds from chiles.
5. Place chiles and drained tomatillos in blender container.
6. Add onion, garlic, and cilantro; blend until pureed.
7. Heat 1 tbsp oil in a large skillet; add pureed mixture.
8. Add soda and sugar; salt to taste.
9. When mixture is cooked, stir in White Sauce, cream, and 1/2 cup cheese.
10. Season with salt and pepper to taste; keep hot.
11. For each serving, soften 3 tortillas in hot oil.
12. Dip tortillas in hot sauce; place some shredded chicken on each.
13. Roll up tightly; place seam side down in individual baking dishes.
14. Cover with remaining sauce and sprinkle cheese over top.
15. Place under broiler until cheese melts and is golden brown.
Makes 4 servings of 3 enchiladas each.
